note: Deflates 2 top-7 effort estimates against real call-sites; CG-iterative-context-extension is the smallest safe ship.

claim: SIZE M, smallest/safest ship: new case 'deep-iterative' in executeStrategy switch (memory-context.ts:1298-1311) + executeDeepIterativeStrategy + CONTEXT_MODES key. Purely additive (default falls through, zero edits to existing strategies); single dispatch site :1684, opt-in. Reuse buildDeepQueryVariants/hyde. NO convergence primitive exists (0 grep) = the one net-new algorithm. Trap: unbounded loop cost (budget enforcer trims final payload only) -> hard iter cap + stop condition + flag default-off.

CORRECTION: SIZE L, not the H/L 'best lev/eff' of iters 11/17. Same clean new-case seam BUT injects an LLM into the synchronous deterministic retrieval hot path (hybrid-search.ts:1365-1366 pure better-sqlite3); no agent-loop step/cost governor exists (controller/cap/ceiling/stop all greenfield). Needs its own design packet. Mitigant: iter-20 LT-tool-rule-memory-chain is a ready loop-governor template.

CORRECTION: SIZE L, not M/M. NOT single-site: RRF lists.push (hybrid-search.ts:~1394-1495) + ChannelName union + 5 hardcoded channel-list sites (query-router.ts:36/68/74/106-107, routing-telemetry.ts:17, hybrid-search.ts:1310/951) + adaptive-weight model (artifact-routing.ts: collapsed buckets, no per-channel slot) + retire 2 inject paths (memory-search.ts:1158-1228, stage1:1304-1326) to avoid double-count. Data reuse strong (summary embedding + searchCommunities exist). Trap: double-count + weight-model mismatch + ablation-tuned retune obligation.

Blast-radius deflated finder optimism: CG-agentic-tool-loop is L effort (greenfield loop+LLM governance) not H/L; MEM-fused-summary-channel is L (cross-cutting fusion + retune) not M/M. Smallest safe ships remain MEM-fact-invalidation-event-time (H/S) + CG-iterative-context-extension (M). Each GO needs a blast-radius pass before roadmap-ready — finder lev/eff is optimistic until checked against call sites.
evidence: iter-22 scoping vs iters 11/17 finder estimates
